title: Axkva Min

{{Quote|Axkva Min was a Nightsister Elder who discovered the art of draining the life force of her enemies to enhance her own power. She became a threat to her own people and was struck down by Gethzerion herself when the full scope of her atrocities was brought to light. Axkva Min was then banished along with her most loyal followers.|[[Rohak]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:TNH">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|The Nightsister Headdress|Dathomir}}</ref>}}
'''Axkva Min''' was a [[Nightsisters/Legends|Nightsister]] who was situated in the [[Nightsister Stronghold]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], and used a [[Nightsister energy lance|specialized energy lance]] as her main weapon.

==Biography==
{{Quote|So, you have come here to free me?|Axkva Min, to a spacer|<ref name="SWGTCG">{{SWGTCG|set=Champions of the Force|scenario=Light Side scenario campaign}}</ref>}}
She was imprisoned in the [[Chamber of Banishment]] near the Stronghold because of her practice of draining the life from her pupils in order to increase her own power. She possessed a fragment of the [[Codex of Tython]], an ancient [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Holocron/Legends|Holocron]]. An [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] agent seeking to reassemble the holocron came looking for Min, using the [[Key of Exile]] provided by [[Sarguillo]], to access the Chamber. There, he found several [[Nightsisters/Legends|Nightsisters]] guarding a large crystal which contained the essence of Axkva Min trapped within. The Codex, possessed by the Rebel, then launched a bolt of energy to the crystal, destroying it and freeing Axkva Min. She attacked the intruder, but was defeated and offered him to take her life, seeing it as a preferable fate to eternal imprisonment. The Rebel, however, was only looking for a crystal on a chain around the witch's neck. When this fragment installed back into the Code, another arc of energy jumped from the Codex to the banishment crystal. The figure of Axkva Min was transported inside again, and the scattered pieces of the crystal reformed themselves with her essence inside. Once again, the Queen of the Nightsisters was trapped within.<ref name="SWGTCG" />

Later she was killed by a group of [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] as she attempted to escape.

A [[Portrait of Axkva Min|portrait]] of the former Nightsister Queen managed to survive her death.

==Behind the scenes==
Axkva Min was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:AM" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Axkva Min was added to the game with the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 5 Notes: 16 December 03|Publish 5]]" update, released on [[December 16]], 2003.<ref name="SonyCite-Publish 5: Vehicles">{{SonyCite|url=recent_updates.jsp?o=60892|text=Publish 5: Vehicles}}</ref> Upon the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Chapter 7 Notes for Nov 1 2007|Chapter 7]]" on [[November 1]], [[2007]],<ref name="SonyCite-Chapter 7: A Collection of Heroes">{{SonyCite|url=players/news_archive.vm?id=67485&month=102007|text=Chapter 7: A Collection of Heroes}}</ref> she was made the main boss of the [[W:c:swg:Axkva Min|eponymous]] "[[W:c:swg:Category:Heroic_instances|Heroic Encounter]]."<ref name="SWG:AM" />
